//: This is the master file for all ignore patterns in the project. The sync-configs script uses this to generate tool-specific ignore files.

gitignore.comment: Patterns for Git to ignore. These are files that should not be committed to the repository.

ide.comment: Patterns for AI assistants and IDEs to ignore for context.

linters.comment: Ignore patterns for various code quality tools.

memory.comment: Files to be ignored by the Basic Memory tool.
